screenshots.title: Screenshots
screenshots.welcome: At first, you may be greeted by the welcome window
screenshots.welcome-info: This is optional, as you can set to open the recorder or editor on startup
screenshots.record: You can record your screen, along with your cursor and key presses
screenshots.record-info: You are able to pick which part of the screen you'll record and control the FPS (you can even capture timelapses!)
screenshots.export: Then you can export your recording
screenshots.export-info: You can make some last minute changes, like hiding your cursor, cropping, trimming, etc.
screenshots.edit: But if you want a more powerful editing experience, there's a proper solution for that
screenshots.edit-info: Here you can add other layers (images, text, etc), add effects, control the timeline and much more

home.subtitle: Screen, webcam and sketchboard recorder with an integrated editor

screenshots.title: Screenshots
screenshots.welcome: At first, you may be greeted by the welcome window
